zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD整体维持震荡上行结构，价格稳定运行于SMA20均线上方，短线多头占优但动能不强，呈现窄幅整理形态，市场情绪偏谨慎乐观。

MACD指标持续为正值且柱体微扩张，显示多头动能仍在累积，但RSI缺失使超买状态不明，短期动能偏中性偏强，缺乏加速突破信号。

下方关键支撑位在1.1008附近的20日均线，其次为1.095区域；上方阻力集中在1.1205近期高点，若放量突破有望测试1.13一带压力。

操作上建议回踩SMA20附近分批布局多单，跌破1.10需止损控制风险，目标看向1.13短线区间，整体以顺势低吸高抛策略为主。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Price action shows /USD maintaining a mild upward bias, with the latest print at 1.12036 hovering near intraday highs. The pair has steadily climbed above the 20-period SMA at 1.10083, signaling short-term bullish recovery after consolidation. However, momentum remains moderate rather than explosive, suggesting a controlled advance. The narrow 24-hour range indicates compression, often preceding a volatility expansion phase in either direction.

MACD reading at 0.0099 indicates a subtle bullish crossover bias, though absence of a clear signal line limits confirmation strength. With RSI unavailable, momentum must be inferred from price structure and moving averages. Trading above the SMA(20) reinforces short-term support from trend-following participants. Overall, indicators suggest early-stage bullish momentum, but conviction remains weak without stronger oscillator confirmation or expanding volume.

Immediate support is forming around 1.1149, aligned with the session low, while stronger structural support sits near the 20-period SMA at 1.1008. A break below this zone could expose downside pressure toward the 1.09 area. On the upside, resistance is immediate at 1.1205, the recent high, followed by a psychological barrier near 1.1250. Sustained breakout above this region may open further upside momentum.

Short-term traders may consider long positions while price holds above 1.1149, using tight risk management due to compressed volatility. A break above 1.1205 with volume confirmation could validate continuation trades toward 1.1250–1.1300. Conversely, failure to hold SMA support at 1.1008 would weaken bullish structure and favor short-term bearish setups. Given mixed momentum signals, scaling into positions rather than full exposure is more appropriate in current conditions.
